channel.title: 2026-05-22 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-05-22 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: Passive Quantum Error Correction of Photon Loss at Breakeven
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. X
👤 Shruti Shirol, Sean van Geldern, Hanzhe Xi, and Chen Wang
Author(s): Shruti Shirol, Sean van Geldern, Hanzhe Xi, and Chen Wang Researchers achieve passive quantum error correction at the “breakeven” point. Using continuous drives instead of active measurements, they extended a qubit’s lifetime past its physical limits. [Phys. Rev. X 16, 021042] Published Fri May 22, 2026

item.title: Tensor Cross Interpolation of Purities in Quantum Many-Body Systems
item.description:
📚 Quantum
👤 Dmytro Kolisnyk, Raimel A. Medina, Romain Vasseur, and Maksym Serbyn
Quantum 10, 2114 (2026). https://doi.org/10.22331/q-2026-05-22-2114 A defining feature of quantum many-body systems is the exponential scaling of the Hilbert space with the number of degrees of freedom. This exponential complexity naïvely renders a complete state characterization, for instance via the complete set of bipartite Renyi entropies for all disjoint regions, a challenging task. Recently, a compact way of storing subregions' purities by encoding them as amplitudes of a fictitious quantum wave function, known as entanglement feature, was proposed. Notably, the entanglement feature can be a simple object even for highly entangled quantum states. However the complexity and practical usage of the entanglement feature for general quantum states has not been explored. In this work, we…
